info.title: Company Intelligence API
info.description: Company Intelligence API. Scrapes a company homepage for description, social links, contact info, tech stack (30+ fingerprints), founding year, employee count signals, and key pages (careers, blog, pricing). Returns structured company profile. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Scrapes a company homepage for description, social links, contact info, tech stack (30+ fingerprints), founding year, employee count signals, and key pages (careers, blog, pricing). Returns structured company profile.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
